'''Benja-Rihn''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. In its [[Temple of Tet-Ami]] was the [[Orb of Passage]]. At some point, [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] traveled back in [[Time/Legends|time]] using the Orb and saved [[Carthas]] from [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]].

{{Planet-stub}}
